title: KVFlow — Workflow-aware Prefix Caching
summary_zh: 首個工作流感知 KV cache 管理框架。將 agent 執行抽象為 Agent Step Graph，用「steps-to-execution」值估計未來激活的時間接近度，以工作流感知優先級取代 LRU。完全重疊的 CPU→GPU prefetch 消除 cache miss stall。1.83×（單工作流）和 2.19×（並行工作流）加速。
summary_en: First workflow-aware KV cache management framework. Abstracts agent execution as an Agent Step Graph, using "steps-to-execution" values to estimate temporal proximity of future activations, replacing LRU with workflow-aware priorities. Fully overlapped CPU->GPU prefetch eliminates cache miss stalls. 1.83x (single workflow) and 2.19x (parallel workflows) speedup.
